name: Naraka Path Pein (S)
pageTitle: Naraka Path Pein (S) - Naruto Arena Classic
description: Naraka Path Pein (S) is one of the six paths of Pein. This path is able to interrogate it's enemies at will. Naraka Path Pein (S) can also give life as well as take it.

skills.name: Outer Path
skills.description: Naraka Path summons the Outer Path, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies for 3 turns. During this time, 'Judgement' can be used.

skills.name: Judgement
skills.description: Naraka executes an enemy affected by 'Outer Path', stealing 35 health from them. For 1 turn, that enemy will ignore healing effects.

skills.name: Rejuvenation
skills.description: Naraka Path uses Rejuvination on himself or an ally, healing them for 25 health and removing all affliction skills from them. This skill can be used on dead allies. If used on a dead ally, 'Rejuvination' will have its cost increased by 1 genjutsu chakra and heal increased by 15 permanently.

skills.name: Chakra Rod Deflection
skills.description: This skill makes Naraka Path Pein (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.
